description: Fraud analyst view for high-value, unusual-hour, and velocity-based risk events.

targets.rawSql:
select count(*) as value
                from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions
                where transaction_timestamp >= now() - interval '24 hours'
                  and transaction_amount >= 100000
                
and (
  '$account_reference' = '$__all'
  or coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') in (${account_reference:sqlstring})
)

select count(*) as value
                from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions
                where transaction_timestamp >= now() - interval '24 hours'
                  and (transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22)
                
and (
  '$account_reference' = '$__all'
  or coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') in (${account_reference:sqlstring})
)

select count(*) as value
                from (
                  select customer_phone_number
                  from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions
                  where transaction_timestamp >= now() - interval '1 hour'
                  
and (
  '$account_reference' = '$__all'
  or coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') in (${account_reference:sqlstring})
)

                  group by customer_phone_number
                  having count(*) >= 5
                ) v

select coalesce(sum(transaction_amount), 0) as value
                from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions
                where transaction_timestamp >= now() - interval '24 hours'
                  and (
        case
          when transaction_amount >= 100000 then 'critical'
          when transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22 then 'elevated'
          when transaction_sequence_per_customer >= 10 then 'velocity'
          else 'normal'
        end
        ) <> 'normal'
                
and (
  '$account_reference' = '$__all'
  or coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') in (${account_reference:sqlstring})
)

select 
        case
          when transaction_amount >= 100000 then 'critical'
          when transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22 then 'elevated'
          when transaction_sequence_per_customer >= 10 then 'velocity'
          else 'normal'
        end
         as risk_bucket, count(*) as events
                from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions
                where $__timeFilter(transaction_timestamp)
                
and (
  '$account_reference' = '$__all'
  or coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') in (${account_reference:sqlstring})
)

                group by 1
                order by 2 desc

select
                  date_trunc('hour', transaction_timestamp) as time,
                  count(*) filter (where (
        case
          when transaction_amount >= 100000 then 'critical'
          when transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22 then 'elevated'
          when transaction_sequence_per_customer >= 10 then 'velocity'
          else 'normal'
        end
        ) = 'critical') as critical,
                  count(*) filter (where (
        case
          when transaction_amount >= 100000 then 'critical'
          when transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22 then 'elevated'
          when transaction_sequence_per_customer >= 10 then 'velocity'
          else 'normal'
        end
        ) = 'elevated') as elevated,
                  count(*) filter (where (
        case
          when transaction_amount >= 100000 then 'critical'
          when transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22 then 'elevated'
          when transaction_sequence_per_customer >= 10 then 'velocity'
          else 'normal'
        end
        ) = 'velocity') as velocity
                from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions
                where $__timeFilter(transaction_timestamp)
                
and (
  '$account_reference' = '$__all'
  or coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') in (${account_reference:sqlstring})
)

                group by 1
                order by 1

select
                  customer_phone_number,
                  count(*) as events,
                  sum(transaction_amount) as value_kes,
                  max(transaction_amount) as largest_transaction,
                  max(transaction_timestamp) as latest_seen,
                  string_agg(distinct (
        case
          when transaction_amount >= 100000 then 'critical'
          when transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22 then 'elevated'
          when transaction_sequence_per_customer >= 10 then 'velocity'
          else 'normal'
        end
        ), ', ' order by (
        case
          when transaction_amount >= 100000 then 'critical'
          when transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22 then 'elevated'
          when transaction_sequence_per_customer >= 10 then 'velocity'
          else 'normal'
        end
        )) as risk_reasons
                from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions
                where transaction_timestamp >= now() - interval '7 days'
                  and (
        case
          when transaction_amount >= 100000 then 'critical'
          when transaction_hour < 6 or transaction_hour >= 22 then 'elevated'
          when transaction_sequence_per_customer >= 10 then 'velocity'
          else 'normal'
        end
        ) <> 'normal'
                
and (
  '$account_reference' = '$__all'
  or coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') in (${account_reference:sqlstring})
)

                group by 1
                order by value_kes desc
                limit 50

list.definition: select distinct coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions order by 1
list.label: Account Reference
list.name: account_reference
list.query: select distinct coalesce(account_reference, 'Unassigned') from public_staging.stg_c2b_transactions order by 1

title: M-Pesa Fraud and Risk Monitoring
